## Summary

Brief description of what this PR does and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Docs / config only

## Testing

- [ ] Tested on desktop (Chrome/Firefox/Safari)
- [ ] Tested on mobile viewport (390px, Chrome DevTools)
- [ ] No console errors
- [ ] Uploaded a PDF and verified all tools work (text, sign, shapes, download)

## Screenshots / recording

If this is a UI change, include a before/after screenshot or short screen recording.

## Notes for reviewer

Anything non-obvious the reviewer should know.
